holdings.infoBox: PYZ is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Carpenter Technology stock at 8.27%, ATI Inc. at 6.09%, CF Industries Holdings at 4.43%, Steel Dynamics at 4.34%, and Alcoa at 3.78%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Basic Materials Momentum ETF (PYZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks an index of US basic materials firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PYZ was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
